## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New evaluation tasks (in existing scene)
- [ ] New design scene
- [ ] Evaluation results (new round data)
- [ ] Tool / script improvement
- [ ] Documentation fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Prompts are original (not from other benchmarks or public datasets)
- [ ] No real brand names — uses fictional brand "StarSelect / 星选" or generic descriptions
- [ ] Task type is clearly specified (ambiguous / explicit / edit / compound)
- [ ] If edit-type: reference image added to `dataset/v1.0/reference-images/`
- [ ] If new tasks: `tasks.json` updated with `prompt_en` and `prompt` (both languages)
- [ ] No sensitive or personally identifiable information

Describe how you verified this change works (e.g., ran `python tools/scoring.py ...`).
